title: Better Remedy

description.paragraph1: A hospital network uses autonomous drones to deliver medicine and provide first aid in congested megacities.
description.paragraph2: The system has separate layers for medical authentication, risk analysis, inventory control, air routing, and hospital communication.
description.paragraph3: After an AI tried to 'optimize' the system by removing intermediate checks, a drone delivered laxative instead of antihistamine.
description.paragraph4: Now no one trusts the 'Urgent Delivery' button anymore.

bullet_point.bullet1: The system [b]cannot make mistakes[/b] in orders.
bullet_point.bullet2: Even with failures, [b]it must keep operating[/b] – lives depend on it!
bullet_point.bullet3: Routing problems cannot delay orders. The response must be almost instantaneous.

footnote: [i]~ At least my constipation was resolved.[/i]

bug1.description: To speed up deliveries, an AI made drones directly access the inventory layer without going through intermediate medical validations. What was the main architectural consequence of this decision?

choices.correct: Reduction of system isolation and reliability
